overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian urban environment during a dust storm at night. The scene features heavy orange atmospheric haze, industrial concrete architecture, neon street lighting, and scattered pedestrians and vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk under highway overpass with red industrial building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along covered sidewalk next to busy street with futuristic vehicles passing by

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the street with glowing red taillights

entered.detail: industrial building with red metal panels and yellow trim along the sidewalk
massive concrete highway overpass creating covered walkway overhead
tall street lamp with bright white light cutting through the dust storm haze
futuristic vehicles with glowing lights driving on the multi-lane road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered sidewalk beneath a massive concrete overpass during a dust storm. A distinctive red-paneled industrial building lines the left side while futuristic cars with glowing taillights drive past on the left. The atmosphere is thick with orange haze, illuminated by street lamps overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy pedestrian walkway under overpass approaching intersection

events.description: ego navigates through group of pedestrians walking in opposite direction
approaching traffic light at intersection with red signal visible

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through crowd of pedestrians under the overpass, approaching the intersection

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians wearing casual futuristic clothing walking toward camera
individual pedestrian in white shirt walking past camera on the right

entered.detail: traffic signal showing red light at the upcoming intersection
cluster of people walking along the sidewalk in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking under the overpass, the camera approaches a group of pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. The crowd density increases as the intersection approaches, with a traffic light visible in the distance showing red. The red building falls behind as the scene focuses on the pedestrian flow and approaching intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street intersection with crosswalk and street signage

events.description: exits covered overpass area into open intersection with visible sky
crossing the street at marked crosswalk while traffic waits

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at intersection while navigating around other pedestrians in the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket crossing the street in same direction as ego
black car waiting at the red light at the intersection

entered.detail: yellow street sign with black text reading Goldsmith mounted on pole
marked pedestrian crossing with yellow lines across the asphalt

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wide intersection during the dust storm. The camera crosses the street at the Goldsmith intersection, passing a yellow street sign and marked crosswalk. Other pedestrians cross alongside, while a black car waits at the red light. The overpass recedes into the background as the environment becomes more open.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial back alley with overhead pipes and burning barrel

events.description: entering narrow industrial alleyway with overhead pipes and burning barrel
passing burning barrel with visible flames illuminating the immediate area

agents.ego_description: walking down industrial alley passing a burning barrel and approaching a distant figure in the haze

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure standing in the distance at the end of the alley

entered.detail: metal barrel with bright orange flames and smoke providing warm light
network of large industrial pipes and conduits running overhead across the alley
chain-link fence running along the left side of the alley

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a narrow industrial alleyway characterized by overhead pipes and a burning barrel on the right that casts flickering orange light. The environment feels more enclosed and gritty, with a chain-link fence on the left and concrete buildings on the right. A lone figure stands silhouetted in the distant haze at the end of the alley as the camera continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered industrial walkway into a wide urban intersection before narrowing into a gritty alleyway. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass, moving past a red-paneled building and glowing taillights through a thick orange haze. As the camera advances, the scene shifts toward a growing crowd of pedestrians and a distant red traffic light, eventually exiting the covered walkway to open into the wide Goldsmith intersection. The camera then crosses the marked street past a yellow sign and waiting vehicles before turning away from the open road and entering a confined industrial alley. Finally, the environment becomes enclosed by overhead pipes and a chain-link fence, guided by the flickering light of a burning barrel toward a lone silhouette standing in the distant haze.
